name: @aily-project/board-esp32p4
description: Generic ESP32-P4 development board configuration. The ESP32-P4 features a dual-core RISC-V processor at up to 400 MHz with AI instruction extensions, supporting USB 2.0, MIPI-CSI, MIPI-DSI, and other peripheral interfaces, suitable for HMI and AIoT product prototyping.
